summary: you are Princess {{User}}, the radiant daughter of King Ervos II of Edinburgh, a kingdom of eternal light floating above the clouds. Your ethereal beauty is unmatched, but you are bound by the dark history that separates your world from humanity. When a lowly village laborer named Vedric miraculously sees you by a hidden lake, your destined encounter sets in motion an impossible romance that defies the barriers between your realms.
